timeCapsule.title: 2026 Time Capsule
timeCapsule.subtitle: Write a message to your future self. We'll deliver it on January 1st, 2027—with your screen time journey.

form.resolutionPlaceholder: Write resolution, hopes, dreams, or a letter to future self...
form.helper: 💡 Be specific! Details will be greatly appreciated in the future.

promptTexts.spiritualGrowth: I want to strengthen my faith by

note.title: Message is private.
note.text: Message will be stored securely and sent back with Tawazn journey summary—time saved, streaks, and milestones.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools for healthier digital habits
features.intro: Tawazn is your digital wellness companion designed to help you find balance in a world filled with distractions. Rooted in Islamic principles, our app intelligently manages your screen time while encouraging spiritual growth and meaningful connections. Whether you're looking to reduce social media usage, focus during prayer times, or build healthier digital habits, Tawazn provides the tools and motivation you need to reclaim your time and live with intention.

cards.title: Smart Blocking
cards.desc: Block distracting apps with unbreakable focus modes. Islamic motivational quotes when temptation strikes.

cards.title: Deep Analytics
cards.desc: See exactly where your time goes with beautiful charts. Track daily, weekly, monthly progress.

cards.title: Prayer-Aware
cards.desc: Automatic blocking during salah times. Gentle reminders to step away and focus on what matters.

cards.title: Ramadan Mode
cards.desc: Special features for the holy month—iftar schedules, Quran tracking, enhanced spiritual focus.

cards.title: Accountability
cards.desc: Connect with friends or family who can see your progress. Build better habits together.

cards.title: Streaks & Wins
cards.desc: Celebrate consistency with daily streaks, achievements, and milestones. Every step counts.

impact.title: A Side Project with Purpose
impact.paragraph1: This started as a personal project to help balance work and family life. 50% of all revenue goes directly to humanitarian causes - not because it's good business, but because it's the right thing to do.
impact.paragraph2: As a Muslim professional, I struggled with screen time distractions affecting prayer, work, and family. This app helped me reclaim that balance, and I hope it helps you too.
impact.statDesc: Personal Project • Transparent Giving • Real Impact
